# Q 

2 

M 

WATERSPOT

## Exterior / maintenance

### Safe solution for removing mineral deposits from any painted exterior surface.

Q²M WaterSpot is a dedicated product designed to remove water spots safely from paintwork. Water spots can appear on fresh coatings due to improper maintenance. Q²M WaterSpot enables the removal of these defects without polishing, and in most cases, without the need to reapply the ceramic coating.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_water-spot_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Strong and effective waterspot remover.

Q²M WaterSpot helps correct water spot damage while preserving existing protection layers. It offers a simple solution for restoring surface clarity without aggressive correction methods.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons19.svg)

SUITABLE FOR ALL PAINTED SURFACES 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons16.svg)

EFFECTIVE WATERMARK REMOVER 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons70.svg)

SLICK AND SMOOTH USAGE 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mwaterspot.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML / 1000 ML

BODYWORK SAFE

YES

PH NEUTRAL

NO

COATING SAFE

DEPENDING ON COATING

Consumption

15ml/panel

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

WATERSPOT

01
Wash the vehicle using a pH neutral shampoo and dry the surface. 

02
Spray Q²M WaterSpot onto the paint or a microfibre cloth. 

03
Wipe the affected area gently. 

04
Repeat application for heavier staining if required. 

05
Rinse or wipe the surface with Q²M Prep after use. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Is Q²M WaterSpot safe for ceramic coatings? 

It is safe in many cases, but coating compatibility depends on the specific coating.

02
Does it replace polishing? 

It does not, but in many cases, it removes water spots without polishing.

03
Can it be used on fresh coatings? 

No, it may permanently reduce the coating performance.

04
Is it pH neutral? 

No, it is an acidic product.

05
How much product is needed per panel? 

One to two sprays are enough.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000260518-Q-M-WaterSpot)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
